description: Modify a joint model property. The property name is denoted by s , the value being assigned is denoted by fvalue . The property should accept a value of type float. While technically any valid type can be used here, none of the distribution keywords will apply and the block contact property command should probably be used instead.

keywords.name: deviation-gaussian
keywords.description: A Gaussian distribution is used to assign the property values randomly, with a mean of fvalue and standard deviation of f .

keywords.name: deviation-uniform
keywords.description: A uniform distribution is used to assign the property values randomly, with a mean value of fvalue and a standard deviation of f .

keywords.name: gradient
keywords.description: Apply a gradient to the property value.

keywords.name: add
keywords.description: Add fvalue to the property value.

keywords.name: multiply
keywords.description: Multiply the property value by fvalue .

keywords.name: vary
keywords.description: Apply a linear variation to the property value.
